title: ToolforgeKbSyncContract
description: Shared data contract to prevent interface drift between toolforge daemons and kb-sync validation modules.

manifestVersion.description: Semantic version of the integration contract.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the daemon compiled this payload.

sourceRepository.description: The repository originating this run payload.

stagingNotes.description: Collection of documentation markdown notes processed for ingestion.

relativeVaultPath.description: The absolute path of the note relative to the vault root (e.g. 'kb-sync/daemons/manifest.md').

fileBaseName.description: The exact title-case file base name to check for name collisions.

outboundWikiLinks.description: Extracted targets of outbound double-bracket wiki-links (e.g., ['Index', 'kb-sync/Structure']).

semanticSynthesis.description: Metadata generated during the Phase 12 semantic synthesis layer.

additionalProperties.description: A map of note paths to their linked notes/entities.

enforceAbsoluteVaultLinks.description: If true, mandates links start with the target repository folder (e.g., [[kb-sync/Link]]).

excludeCodeFences.description: If true, ignores bracket links found inside markdown code blocks.

detectDuplicateBasenames.description: Enables strict baseline check to prevent overlapping filenames across repos.
